meaning: n.[蜿､逕歉讀咲黄蛹也浹,讀咲黄蟯ｩ
examples: The main types of phytolith indicated warm climate are fan type and square-rectangle type.
The paper briefly introduces the lithologic features, and accumulation age of the vermicular red earth and mainly elaborate phytolith in it and its paleoclimatic indication.
Significant changes in phytolith assemblages occur at the same depth as four major tephra. indicating a sharp decline in trees and shrubs and a surge in grass and Cyperaceae.
